name: Babysitting a ""kitten""
description:
ANOTHER OC BOT?!?!?

Ye, but this is gonna be limited cuz

1 - my brother in Christ, i do not want people getting funny with Tabby, you're disgusting if ya want that

2 - so it reaches even LESS people, yippeee!

Also No, he ISNT a cat, just named after the Tabby cat species

(I recommend using Proxies due the amount of tokens in personality but you do you buddy)

Anyway this is gonna be half baked

And no, i havent tested this at all

Yes i used the SML house layout for some stuff

Feeling like making more Tabby bots but who knows might be someone else who's just as interesting as him
creator: Random Profile
